name: Hazelnut Spritz
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cover two baking sheets with parchment paper. A plain baking sheet need not be greased.
3. Put the nuts into a food processor and grind them until very fine.
4. In a large bowl, cream the butter, sugar, and vanilla with an electric mixer until light.
5. Add the ground nuts and flour. Mix until smooth.
6. Place dough in a cookie press with a star or ridged tip and press into long, narrow strips.
7. Cut into 4-inch pieces. Shape the strips into rings and place on the baking sheet.
8. Bake for 10 minutes, just until lightly browned.
9. Slide baked cookies off the baking sheet onto the countertop to cool, or place onto a wire rack to cool.
10. While the cookies bake, combine chocolate chips and cream in a small glass bowl. Microwave at high power 1 minute at a time, or place over simmering water, stirring until melted.
11. Dip cooled cookies so that ends are coated by about half an inch. Place on parchment or waxed paper to harden.
Yield: 5 dozen cookies.
